metadata.description: Bizkol marketing toolbox — KOL campaigns + full-funnel marketing intelligence for agencies and direct merchants.

plugins.name: bizkol
plugins.description: KOL/influencer campaign management, creator discovery, outreach, SEO/GEO audits, competitor research, Shopify commerce review, brand voice, content creation, campaign planning, and email sequences. Deeply integrated with the Bizkol MCP (mcp.bizkol.ai).
